verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord You’re the Light in the darkness night When I’m with You everything’s alright Lord You’re the One who’s faithful and true In all that I do, I worship You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord You’re the song that I love to sing Jesus You are my everything Took what was old and made it brand new In all that I do, I worship You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord You are my shelter You’re the Rock in whom I will trust Though the storms of life come in like a flood You’ll raise up a standard for me And give me victory
